texto: Perhaps it's no coincidence that the word words is an anagram of sword. Well-used words cut through ambiguity and confusion like a sharp sword in the hands of an expert swordsman.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Anu Garg: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Perhaps it's no coincidence that the word words is an anagram of sword. Well-used words cut throu…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, words, sword pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
